meta.title: Logic Nails | Nail Salon in Chandler, AZ
meta.description: Logic Nails is a full-service nail salon on S Gilbert Rd in Chandler, AZ, offering manicures, pedicures, acrylics, waxing, and lash extensions. Call to book.

hero.headline: Chandler's neighborhood nail salon
hero.subhead: Manicures, pedicures, acrylics, waxing, and lash extensions in a clean, relaxing space on S Gilbert Rd. Walk-ins welcome, or call ahead to skip the wait.

services.name: Manicures
services.description: Classic, gel, and spa manicures with shaping, cuticle care, and polish of your choice.

services.name: Pedicures
services.description: Soaking, exfoliation, and massage finished with a polish or gel that holds up in sandals season.

services.name: Acrylic Nails
services.description: Full sets and fills, from natural shapes to custom lengths and nail art.

services.name: Waxing
services.description: Quick, precise waxing for brows, lip, and other areas.

services.name: Lash Extensions
services.description: Classic and volume lash sets for lasting length and lift without daily mascara.

footer.text: Logic Nails - your neighborhood nail salon in Chandler, Arizona.
